Task: Deploy fabric-bootstrap module to enable WS OAP tenant gate
Description: Apply fabric-bootstrap Terraform module; verify fabric_tenant_setting ConfigureWorkspaceLevelOutboundNetworkRules is enabled in Fabric admin portal
Assumptions: Fabric Admin role held by service principal used for Terraform; tenant setting does not already exist

Task: Provision Fabric Capacity F64 via azurerm_fabric_capacity
Description: Deploy azurerm_fabric_capacity resource in target Azure subscription; validate capacity appears in Fabric admin portal with Active state
Assumptions: Azure subscription available with quota for F64 SKU; Terraform service principal has Contributor on resource group

Task: Validate capacity state and install Capacity Metrics Power BI app
Description: Run terraform plan to confirm capacity state == Active; install Fabric Capacity Metrics template app from AppSource against provisioned capacity
Assumptions: AppSource accessible from PoC environment; user has Power BI workspace for app install

Task: Deploy PoC workspace with WS OAP enforced via fabric-workspace module
Description: Apply fabric-workspace module with capacity_id from previous story; confirm fabric_workspace_network_communication_policy applies inbound+outbound Deny
Assumptions: fabric-bootstrap complete; WS OAP tenant gate enabled

Task: Configure MPEs to ADLS Gen2 dfs and blob subresources via fabric-mpe module
Description: Deploy two fabric-mpe module instances targeting PoC ADLS account (subresource_type=dfs and blob); confirm pending connection request appears on ADLS private endpoint blade
Assumptions: ADLS Gen2 account provisioned in same Azure region as Fabric capacity; network team notified for PE approval

Task: Configure MPE to Azure Key Vault via fabric-mpe module
Description: Deploy fabric-mpe module instance targeting Key Vault (subresource_type=vault); Key Vault used for secrets referenced in pipeline linked services
Assumptions: Key Vault provisioned; workspace system-assigned identity enabled

Task: Approve all MPE connections on target Azure resources
Description: Approve pending PE connection requests on ADLS and Key Vault via azurerm_private_endpoint_connection or portal; validate MPE status shows Approved in Fabric portal
Assumptions: Approver has Owner or Network Contributor on target resources

Task: Configure domain hierarchy and default sensitivity label via fabric-domain module
Description: Apply fabric-domain module; assign PoC workspace to domain; set default_label_id to General sensitivity label; verify label appears on newly created items
Assumptions: Sensitivity label published in M365 compliance centre; label GUID available as Terraform variable

Task: Deploy custom Spark pools via fabric-spark-config module
Description: Apply fabric-spark-config with at least one MemoryOptimized custom pool (autoscale 2-8); validate starter pool explicitly disabled; confirm pool visible in workspace Spark settings
Assumptions: WS OAP enforced (disables starter pool); F64 capacity available

Task: Deploy pinned library environment with private PyPI routing via fabric-environment module
Description: Apply fabric-environment referencing the custom pool; set spark_properties with private PyPI index-url; include pandas delta-spark pyarrow; validate environment publishes successfully
Assumptions: Private PyPI mirror on blob accessible via blob MPE; packages pre-mirrored

Task: Connect PoC workspace to Git repository via fabric-workspace-git module
Description: Apply fabric-workspace-git; workspace admin must first enable Allow Git Integration in Fabric portal (WS OAP blocks by default); validate Git status shows Connected
Assumptions: ADO/GitHub service connection created; allow_git_integration toggled in Fabric admin portal before apply

Task: Validate CI gate pipeline on sample PR with intentional violations
Description: Submit test PR with hardcoded credential and public pypi.org URL in notebook; confirm bandit detect-secrets and semgrep all fire and block merge; submit clean PR and confirm gate passes and workspace syncs
Assumptions: GitHub Actions or ADO pipeline configured; branch protection requires CI gate to pass

Task: Create Bronze Lakehouse via fabric-lakehouse Terraform module
Description: Apply fabric-lakehouse in PoC workspace; confirm Lakehouse item and SQL analytics endpoint appear; note OneLake DFS path for pipeline configuration
Assumptions: fabric-lakehouse module built; workspace provisioned

Task: Build Data Factory pipeline to ingest synthetic financial data from ADLS into Bronze Lakehouse
Description: Create Data Pipeline with Copy activity sourcing from ADLS Gen2 (via MPE dfs endpoint) writing Parquet files to Bronze Lakehouse Files section; parameterise source path and target folder
Assumptions: ADLS MPE approved; synthetic dataset pre-loaded to source ADLS container; no PII in PoC data

Task: Execute pipeline and validate raw data landing in Bronze OneLake path
Description: Trigger pipeline run; confirm files appear in Bronze Lakehouse Files section; verify OneLake DFS path accessible; spot-check row counts against source
Assumptions: Pipeline and MPE configuration complete

Task: Develop PySpark notebook for Bronze to Silver cleansing and schema enforcement
Description: Write notebook using pinned environment; read Bronze Parquet files; apply schema enforcement null handling deduplication column renaming; write Delta table to Silver Lakehouse
Assumptions: Bronze Lakehouse populated; pinned environment deployed; Silver Lakehouse created

Task: Write cleansed output as managed Delta table to Silver Lakehouse
Description: Confirm Delta table registered in Silver Lakehouse table section with schema visible in SQL analytics endpoint; validate DESCRIBE TABLE output matches expected schema
Assumptions: Silver notebook complete; Silver Lakehouse provisioned

Task: Demonstrate supply chain security: show pip install routed via private PyPI mirror
Description: In notebook cell run %pip install pandas and capture pip output showing index URL is the private mirror not pypi.org; show a pip install against pypi.org is blocked by network policy
Assumptions: WS OAP active; private PyPI mirror accessible via blob MPE; spark_properties index-url set in fabric-environment

Task: Develop PySpark notebook for Silver to Gold business-level aggregations
Description: Read Silver Delta tables; produce Gold tables: daily transaction summary by account customer balance snapshot product category breakdown; write as Delta managed tables in Gold Lakehouse
Assumptions: Silver transformation complete; Gold Lakehouse provisioned

Task: Register Gold Delta tables and validate SQL analytics endpoint
Description: Confirm all Gold tables visible in SQL analytics endpoint; run spot-check SELECT queries to validate row counts and data types; note TDS connection string for Warehouse and Power BI use
Assumptions: Gold notebook complete

Task: Schedule Bronze-Silver-Gold pipeline as a triggered orchestration pipeline
Description: Wire Bronze ingest Silver transform and Gold aggregation notebooks into single orchestration pipeline with activity dependencies; set scheduled trigger; validate end-to-end run completes
Assumptions: All three notebook tasks complete; pipelines committed to Git and synced

Task: Create Fabric Warehouse via fabric-warehouse Terraform module
Description: Apply fabric-warehouse module in PoC workspace; confirm Warehouse item appears with TDS connection string; validate TDS endpoint reachable from trusted network
Assumptions: fabric-warehouse module built; WS OAP active

Task: Deploy DDL migration scripts for fact and dimension tables via CI/CD sqlcmd step
Description: Write CREATE TABLE DDL for FactTransactions DimCustomer DimProduct DimDate; commit to /warehouse/migrations/ in Git; add sqlcmd pipeline stage to CI/CD running migrations on merge to develop
Assumptions: Warehouse provisioned; TDS endpoint accessible from CI/CD runner; runner identity has db_ddladmin

Task: Load Gold Lakehouse aggregations into Warehouse via Data Factory pipeline
Description: Create Data Pipeline using Copy activity reading from Gold Lakehouse SQL analytics endpoint and writing to Warehouse tables; validate row counts match Gold Delta tables
Assumptions: DDL migrations complete; Gold Lakehouse populated; Warehouse provisioned

Task: Implement dynamic data masking on PII columns in Warehouse
Description: Apply ALTER TABLE ... ALTER COLUMN ... MASKED WITH on CustomerName AccountNumber TaxFileNumber columns; demonstrate masking returns XXXX to non-privileged users; unmasked to users with UNMASK permission
Assumptions: Warehouse schema deployed; test user accounts without UNMASK permission available

Task: Configure column-level security restricting sensitive financial columns to Analyst role
Description: DENY SELECT on TransactionAmount and Balance columns to Public role; GRANT SELECT to AnalystRole; demonstrate analyst AAD group member can query sensitive columns while Viewer role cannot
Assumptions: AAD groups for Analyst and Viewer roles pre-created; test users assigned to respective groups

Task: Validate masking and column-level security with test user credentials
Description: Run validation queries as Viewer user (expect masked PII and denied sensitive columns) and Analyst user (expect unmasked data and access granted); document results for governance demonstration
Assumptions: Test users provisioned; masking and CLS applied

Task: Create Power BI semantic model over Warehouse TDS endpoint in DirectQuery mode
Description: Build PBIP format semantic model connecting to Warehouse via TDS endpoint using AAD auth; define measures for Total Transactions Average Balance Transaction Count by Category; implement RLS roles for branch/entity isolation
Assumptions: Warehouse loaded with Gold data; Power BI Desktop accessible; TDS endpoint reachable from developer network

Task: Build financial overview dashboard with transaction trends and balance summary
Description: Create Power BI report with transaction volume trend line chart balance distribution histogram top accounts by transaction value table product category breakdown donut chart; commit PBIP files to Git and sync to workspace
Assumptions: Semantic model complete; synthetic financial data loaded; PBIP format enabled

Task: Demonstrate row-level security showing different users see different data slices
Description: Use Power BI View As feature to show users mapped to Branch A role only see Branch A transactions; document RLS behaviour for governance walkthrough
Assumptions: RLS roles defined in semantic model; test users mapped to roles

Task: Create Eventhouse and KQL Database via fabric-eventhouse Terraform module
Description: Apply fabric-eventhouse module in PoC workspace; confirm Eventhouse and KQL Database items appear; note KQL query URI for CLI-based schema deployment
Assumptions: fabric-eventhouse module built; workspace provisioned

Task: Deploy KQL table schema retention policy and update policy via KQL migration scripts in CI/CD
Description: Write .kql schema scripts: CREATE TABLE Transactions; set retention policy 365 days; add CI/CD pipeline stage using Kusto CLI to apply scripts on merge to develop
Assumptions: Eventhouse provisioned; KQL query URI available; Kusto CLI accessible from CI/CD runner with AllDatabasesAdmin

Task: Enable OneLake availability on KQL Database for Delta mirroring to OneLake
Description: Toggle OneLake availability on in KQL Database settings; validate Delta Parquet files appear in OneLake under Eventhouse path; confirm data queryable via Lakehouse shortcut
Assumptions: Eventhouse and KQL Database provisioned; OneLake availability is a portal toggle

Task: Configure Eventstream with simulated transaction event source using Azure Event Hubs
Description: Create Eventstream item; connect to Azure Event Hubs namespace publishing synthetic transaction JSON events at ~100 events/min; validate events appearing in Eventstream preview pane
Assumptions: Azure Event Hubs namespace provisioned; synthetic event generator running

Task: Route Eventstream output to Eventhouse KQL Database Transactions table
Description: Add Eventhouse destination to Eventstream; map JSON event fields to KQL table columns; validate streaming ingestion with query: Transactions | take 10
Assumptions: Eventstream source connected; Eventhouse and Transactions table provisioned

Task: Validate streaming data in KQL and confirm Delta mirror in OneLake
Description: Run KQL query confirming row count growing over time; check OneLake path for Delta files; run Spark read against OneLake Eventhouse Delta path
Assumptions: Eventstream routing complete; OneLake availability enabled

Task: Develop KQL anomaly detection query using series_decompose_anomalies on transaction volume
Description: Write KQL: bin transactions into 1-minute buckets; apply series_decompose_anomalies() to detect volume spikes; return anomaly score and direction; save as KQL queryset for reuse by Activator
Assumptions: Streaming data flowing into Eventhouse; sufficient data history; synthetic generator can simulate spikes

Task: Configure Activator rule to send Teams notification on transaction volume anomaly
Description: Create Activator item; connect to Eventstream as data source; define condition: anomaly_score > threshold for 3 consecutive minutes; set action to send adaptive card to PoC Teams channel
Assumptions: Activator is GA; Teams webhook available; anomaly detection query validated

Task: Build real-time Power BI dashboard consuming Eventhouse via KQL visual with auto-refresh
Description: Create Power BI report with KQL visual (30s auto-refresh): live transaction rate gauge rolling 5-minute volume trend anomaly flag indicator; demonstrate live refresh during simulated spike event
Assumptions: Eventhouse streaming; KQL visual available in Power BI Desktop; Power BI workspace in same Fabric tenant

Task: Develop credit risk scoring notebook using scikit-learn on synthetic Gold Lakehouse data
Description: Write PySpark notebook reading Gold DimCustomer and FactTransactions; engineer features (transaction frequency average amount days since last transaction); train logistic regression for binary default prediction; evaluate with AUC and F1 metrics
Assumptions: Gold Lakehouse populated with synthetic data including target label column; scikit-learn in pinned environment; no real customer data in PoC

Task: Instrument training notebook with MLflow experiment tracking
Description: Add mlflow.start_run() to notebook; log hyperparameters (C max_iter) training metrics (AUC precision recall) and model artifact; confirm experiment and run appear in Fabric ML Experiments item
Assumptions: MLflow pre-installed in Fabric Spark runtime; ML Experiments item auto-created on first log

Task: Register trained model to Fabric ML Models and tag with version metadata
Description: Call mlflow.sklearn.log_model() with registered_model_name; confirm model version appears in ML Models item; add tags: model_type=credit_risk training_data=synthetic version=1.0
Assumptions: Training notebook complete; MLflow logging instrumented

Task: Create Spark Job Definition for batch inference loading model from ML Models registry
Description: Write parameterised Python scoring script loading registered model via mlflow.pyfunc.load_model(); reads unseen Gold Lakehouse records; writes scored output (AccountId ProbabilityOfDefault ScoreDate) back to Gold Lakehouse as Delta table
Assumptions: Model registered in ML Models; Gold Lakehouse has held-out scoring dataset; Spark Job Definition item available

Task: Trigger batch scoring from scheduled Data Factory orchestration pipeline
Description: Add Spark Job Definition activity to master orchestration pipeline; configure daily schedule; validate end-to-end: pipeline triggers scoring runs scored Delta table updated in Gold Lakehouse
Assumptions: Spark Job Definition committed to Git and synced; master pipeline exists

Task: Surface model scores in Power BI financial dashboard as a credit risk heat map
Description: Add new report page to financial dashboard showing customer credit risk scores by segment; use conditional formatting to highlight high-risk accounts; demonstrate end-to-end: pipeline runs scores update dashboard refreshes
Assumptions: Batch scoring pipeline complete; scored Delta table in Gold Lakehouse; Power BI semantic model includes scored table

Task: Create Fabric Data Agent grounded in Gold Lakehouse SQL endpoint and Warehouse
Description: Create Data Agent item in Fabric portal (Preview); add Gold Lakehouse SQL analytics endpoint and Fabric Warehouse as grounding sources; configure schema visibility (expose FactTransactions DimCustomer risk scores; exclude raw Bronze tables)
Assumptions: Data Agent feature enabled in Fabric tenant; Azure OpenAI backend available in Fabric tenant region; Gold and Warehouse populated

Task: Configure agent system prompt and data access permissions for financial context
Description: Write system prompt establishing financial data assistant persona; add instructions to cite data source and time period; restrict to SELECT-only operations; configure which AAD groups can interact with the agent
Assumptions: Data Agent created; grounding data sources connected

Task: Test natural language queries against Fabric financial data end-to-end
Description: Run NL queries: "What was total transaction volume last week?", "Which customers have highest default risk score?", "Show top 10 accounts by transaction frequency in March"; validate SQL generated results correct and CLS enforced
Assumptions: Agent configured; data populated; test user without UNMASK permission available to validate CLS through agent

Task: Publish Fabric Data Agent as a skill action in Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: In Copilot Studio create new Copilot; add Fabric Data Agent as Connector action skill; configure OAuth with AAD authentication; test action returns correct responses in Copilot Studio test pane
Assumptions: Copilot Studio licence available in M365 tenant; Fabric Data Agent published; AAD app registration created for OAuth flow

Task: Build Teams-deployed chatbot topic routing financial queries to Fabric Data Agent
Description: Create trigger phrases topic in Copilot Studio: "show me data" "query transactions" "financial report"; wire to Fabric Data Agent skill action; deploy Copilot to PoC Teams channel; test end-to-end from Teams message to Fabric data response
Assumptions: Copilot Studio skill action configured; Teams channel available; M365 Copilot Studio deployment permissions granted

Task: Demonstrate end-to-end natural language query from Teams to Fabric Warehouse data
Description: Live demo: user types "What were total transactions in the last 7 days?" in Teams → Copilot Studio routes to Fabric Data Agent → agent queries Warehouse → returns formatted answer in Teams adaptive card
Assumptions: Full integration stack deployed; demo account with appropriate permissions; Teams channel accessible

Task: Configure Fabric Operational Agent to monitor medallion pipeline for failures and data quality
Description: Enable Fabric Operational Agent (Preview) on PoC workspace; configure monitoring scope: Bronze ingest pipeline Silver notebook Gold pipeline; set notification targets for pipeline failure and data quality anomaly events
Assumptions: Fabric Operational Agents feature enabled in tenant; pipelines committed and synced; Teams webhook available

Task: Wire Operational Agent alert output to Activator for automated downstream notification
Description: Connect Operational Agent output events to Activator; define rule: if pipeline failure event received send Teams alert with pipeline name failure time and error summary
Assumptions: Activator configured from RTI feature; Operational Agent emitting events; Activator supports Operational Agent as event source

Task: Demonstrate automated alerting by intentionally breaking the Bronze ingest pipeline
Description: Introduce intentional failure in Bronze pipeline (bad source path); observe Operational Agent detects failure; confirm Activator fires Teams notification within latency window; fix pipeline and confirm recovery
Assumptions: Full agentic monitoring stack configured; Teams notification latency acceptable for demo

Task: Validate auto-registration of all Fabric items in integrated Purview hub
Description: Navigate to Fabric Purview hub (Settings → Governance); confirm all items auto-registered: Bronze/Silver/Gold Lakehouses Warehouse Pipelines Eventhouse; no manual scan required
Assumptions: Purview integration on by default for Fabric; items created and populated from previous features

Task: Trace end-to-end data lineage from ADLS source through medallion tiers to Power BI report
Description: In Purview hub open Bronze Lakehouse lineage view; confirm upstream link to ADLS source; trace downstream through Silver transformation Gold aggregation Warehouse load pipeline to Power BI semantic model and report
Assumptions: All pipelines and notebooks have run at least once; pipelines created as Fabric Data Pipeline items

Task: Apply and verify sensitivity label inheritance from domain default across workspace items
Description: Confirm newly created Warehouse tables and Power BI reports automatically inherit General sensitivity label from domain default via fabric-domain module; verify label visible in Purview hub; show label flows through to exported Excel/PDF
Assumptions: Sensitivity label published in M365 compliance centre; domain default_label_id set in fabric-domain module; MIP licensing on demo accounts

Task: Configure Capacity Metrics dashboard with per-workspace and per-workload breakdown
Description: Connect Fabric Capacity Metrics Power BI app to PoC F64 capacity; configure workspace filter; validate CU metrics visible for Spark Warehouse Eventstream and Pipeline workloads
Assumptions: Capacity Metrics app installed from AppSource; capacity admin permissions on demo account; capacity has been running workloads

Task: Demonstrate CU consumption patterns during concurrent workload execution
Description: Run Bronze pipeline Silver notebook and Warehouse query concurrently; observe CU burst behaviour in Capacity Metrics app; show smooth model averaging over 24-hour window; identify highest CU-consuming workload
Assumptions: Capacity Metrics app connected; synthetic workloads available to trigger on demand

Task: Show chargeback model using per-workspace CU attribution in Capacity Metrics
Description: Demonstrate per-workspace CU breakdown; explain how this supports chargeback to business units; show how multi-capacity pattern would isolate prod vs dev billing
Assumptions: Single workspace sufficient for concept illustration

Task: Submit PR with hardcoded credential in notebook and show detect-secrets blocks merge
Description: Create test branch; add notebook cell containing fake connection string (format: AccountKey=AAAA...); open PR; observe detect-secrets flags credential; confirm merge blocked with annotation on failing line
Assumptions: CI gate pipeline configured; detect-secrets baseline file committed; branch protection requires status checks to pass

Task: Submit PR with public PyPI install URL and show semgrep URL check blocks merge
Description: Add notebook cell with %pip install pandas --index-url https://pypi.org/simple; open PR; confirm semgrep custom rule fires and blocks merge; show fix using private mirror URL passes the gate
Assumptions: Semgrep custom rule for pypi.org URL pattern committed; CI gate running semgrep on *.Notebook/ paths

Task: Demonstrate clean PR merge triggering workspace Git sync and live item update in Fabric portal
Description: Submit clean PR adding a comment to a notebook; merge to develop branch; show Fabric workspace Git status updating; sync workspace; confirm notebook item updated in Fabric portal within seconds
Assumptions: Workspace-git module connected to develop branch; Fabric Git sync near-real-time on branch push
